title: tithymalus × wagneri
intro: Tithymalus × wagneri, a hybrid plant of the Euphorbia genus, is a succulent species known for its medicinal properties and versatility. It contains a milky sap that has been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery, and support the immune system. Tithymalus × wagneri is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
